name: markitdown
description: A plugin that converts MS Office documents (docx, xlsx, pptx, doc, xls, ppt) to markdown text using the markitdown Python library.

process.description: Convert an MS Office document to markdown text.

filePath.description: Path to the MS Office file to convert.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the input file. Must be a supported MS Office MIME type.

documentText.description: Extracted markdown content from the MS Office document.

installed.description: Check if markitdown is available on the system.
true if markitdown is available, false otherwise.

success.description: true if markitdown is available after the installation attempt.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the installation result.
